title: Archive classification and promotion
outcome: Archive taxonomy documented in docs/bin-archive.md (superseded/imported/retired/reference/duplicate/stale + promotion routes). manifest.schema.json already carries optional archive_reason enum + promoted_to. Tracked archived fixture demonstrates the contract without a live move. _selfcheck_manifest_archive_reason accepts stale+promoted_to and rejects invalid reasons. Cleanup plans (S3) already emit planned archive_reason/promoted_to; no draft-state mutation.
validation: ontarch:validate PASS — both fixtures + archive_reason selfcheck (accept/reject).
decisions: taxonomy is documented and schema-validated; promotion is not automated at draft gateway
canon ref: lg_wfos_lvl_0_persistence_sync.md §20–20.1 (not the stale epic lg_workstream_sync.md)
token_note: one archive_reason/promoted_to label answers why-is-this-here without reading full history
